---
title: "delete_diagonal"
generated: true
description: "Zero out the main diagonal of a square matrix block."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.linalg.matrix`](../nitrix-linalg-matrix.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:delete_diagonal -->
```python
delete_diagonal(A: Num[Array, '... i i']) -> Num[Array, '... i i']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:delete_diagonal -->
Zero out the main diagonal of a square matrix block.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:delete_diagonal -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `A` | `Num` | `...` × `i` × `i` | — | Square matrix block. |

**Returns** `Num` — shape `...` × `i` × `i`. A copy of `A` with its main diagonal set to zero and all off-diagonal entries unchanged.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:delete_diagonal -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `i` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
